use_cases: User data entry forms with inline validation feedback
Contact and registration forms with error messaging
Settings pages requiring user input with error states
Login forms with error handling for invalid credentials
ai_summary: A clean, minimal text input component with integrated error state handling. Features customizable sizes (small, medium, large), error icons with optional action links, and red-themed error messaging for validation feedback. Built with Tailwind CSS for modern SaaS and e-commerce applications requiring accessible form inputs.
